creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-07-15 22:16:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/sxml        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  SXML is a skimpy XML parsing and grafting C library that you can use to read
  and write XML-like configuration file for your application.
  
  Author: Kouichi ABE (WALL) <kouichi@MysticWALL.COM>
  WWW:    http://www.MysticWALL.COM/software/sxml/index.html
  
  PR:             ports/113994
  Submitted by:   Kouichi ABE (WALL) <kouichi@mysticwall.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1155    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/textproc/sxml/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/sxml/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/sxml/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/textproc/sxml/pkg-plist (new)
